Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 216 

32 = Separated 
33 = Single, widowed, or divorced 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This element is reported by the state when the information is material to eligibility (i.e., 
institutionalization).
